mapper.select: select id, user_id, total_points, available_points, used_points, level_code from sc_user_point_account where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sc_user_point_account(user_id, total_points, available_points, used_points, level_code, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{userId}, #{totalPoints}, #{availablePoints}, #{usedPoints}, #{levelCode}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
